surfaces.card_default: bg-white border border-[#E5E7EB] rounded-2xl shadow-none transition-all duration-200
surfaces.glass_header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-[#E5E7EB] z-50 sticky top-0

components.button_primary: bg-[#1C3B35] text-white rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-semibold hover:bg-[#162F2A] transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#E3EBE6] focus:ring-offset-2
components.button_secondary: bg-[#E3EBE6] text-[#1C3B35] rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-semibold hover:bg-[#D1E0D7] transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1C3B35] focus:ring-offset-2
components.button_outline: bg-transparent border border-[#E5E7EB] text-[#111827] rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-semibold hover:bg-[#F3F4F6] transition-colors
components.badge_active: bg-[#E8F0EB] text-[#1F4D36] px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
components.badge_pending: bg-[#FEF3C7] text-[#92400E] px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
components.badge_declined: bg-[#FEE2E2] text-[#991B1B] px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider

image_urls.description: Soft sage green leaf texture for a subtle background banner or profile hero section

layout_instructions.dashboard_grid: Use 'Control Room' dense grid approach, but with soft rounded cards. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4. Sidebar takes 1 col, main content takes 3 cols.
layout_instructions.sidebar: Contains the Employee Profile Card, Add-On Benefits, and 1095-C Download Card.
layout_instructions.main_content: Contains Enrollment Status Badge, Cost Summary Card, Enrolled Plan Detail Card, Premium Breakdown Table.
layout_instructions.open_enrollment_view: 4-col grid. Sidebar (1 col) has profile and dynamic cost summary based on selected tier. Main (3 col) shows plan comparison cards side-by-side using a bento layout.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure #1C3B35 text meets WCAG AA on #E3EBE6 and #F9F9F8 backgrounds.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: MUST include data-testid on all buttons, plan cards, dialog triggers, and key informational elements (like balances or plan names) using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., 'enroll-plan-button', 'decline-coverage-trigger').
accessibility_and_testing.motion: Use transition-all duration-200 for hovers. Respect prefers-reduced-motion.

specific_feature_guidelines.profile_card: Minimalist bento approach. Use the avatar overlapping a subtle sage cover image (abstract_background_texture). Deep green text.
specific_feature_guidelines.cost_summary: Use large typography for the monthly premium (e.g., text-4xl). Include a horizontal progress bar or segmented bar showing employer vs employee split. Legend below the bar.
specific_feature_guidelines.plan_detail_card: Grid within a grid (bento). Top row: Carrier Logo (use a clean font or phosphor icon as placeholder, DO NOT use external placeholder images), Plan Name. Bottom row: 3-4 bento boxes for Deductible, OOP Max, Copay. Use soft grey backgrounds for the inner bento boxes to distinguish them from the white card.
specific_feature_guidelines.premium_table: No zebra striping. Generous padding in cells (p-4). Subdued text for table headers (overline style). Current enrolled tier highlighted with #E3EBE6 background.
specific_feature_guidelines.decline_coverage_dialog: Clean Shadcn Dialog. Title: Decline Coverage. Content: Select reason from Shadcn Select component. Action: Danger button ('Decline Coverage' in #991B1B bg).
specific_feature_guidelines.open_enrollment_cards: Interactive cards. When unselected, border is #E5E7EB. When selected, border becomes 2px #1C3B35 and a small Phosphor CheckCircle icon appears in the top right.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Initialize React project, install Tailwind and Shadcn.
2. Add fonts Manrope and Work Sans via Google Fonts in index.css.
4. Build the Enrolled View (3-col layout: sidebar + main).
5. Build the Open Enrollment View (Plan Selection) with interactive state.
7. Ensure all interactive components have data-testid attributes.
8. Use the color palette and spacing rules exactly as defined.
